description: Very affordable and big square footage! Lots of upgrades in recent years. Welcome to this beautifully maintained three level home, perfect for a young family! Featuring 3 or 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, this bright and spacious unit offers flexible living space to suit your needs! Enjoy a large, private, sunny, south facing patio - ideal for relaxing or entertaining! Located in a well kept, family friendly complex in desirable Champlain Heights, close to parks, schools and transit. Nearby Elementary Schools, Killarney High School,Champlain Mall and Metrotown nearby. Carport right out front!
